schema.source: Entity ID of the source node (e.g. P0001)
schema.target: Entity ID of the target node (e.g. O0003)
schema.type: director_of | shareholder_of | employee_of | related_to | communicated_with | owned_by | associated_with | located_at | attended | funded_by | custom

attributes.end_date: YYYY-MM-DD — when it ended (null if current)

evidence_refs: Evidence register references supporting this link
